summary: Iteration 146: Cognition Platform Hardening - Backend APIs verified, frontend UI test limited by admin-only access

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 timeout (>60s response time on cold start)

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent JavaScript error: TypeError .trim() is not a function on sendMessage when clicking quick prompts
ui_bugs.note: Error appears on first message send after page load. May be race condition with input state.

access_control_notes.note: Page is correctly restricted to adminOnly users. Test user andre@thestrategysquad.com.au does not have admin role, so UI elements could not be verified visually

POST /api/soundboard/chat.notes: Does NOT hard-fail when provider keys missing. Returns fallback with reply, confidence_score, data_sources_count, data_freshness fields

action_items: INVESTIGATE: MySoundBoard sendMessage() intermittent TypeError on .trim() - line 231 in MySoundBoard.js. May need defensive check: const userMessage = String(messageOverride ?? input ?? '').trim();
CONSIDER: Add admin user credentials for future testing of /observability page
LOW PRIORITY: Cognition platform audit endpoint can timeout on cold start - consider adding timeout handling or loading indicator
critical_code_review_comments: MySoundBoard.js line 231: (messageOverride ?? input).trim() assumes messageOverride or input is always a string. If messageOverride is an object or undefined/null in edge cases, this will fail.
ObservabilityPage correctly renders cognition platform audit with all required sections and data-testids

success_rate.backend: 100% (all 5 endpoints verified with correct data contracts)
success_rate.frontend: 80% (Observability access-restricted, MySoundBoard has intermittent JS error)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend cognition APIs return correct data contracts with confidence_score, data_sources_count, data_freshness, lineage. Auth endpoint is /api/auth/supabase/login. ObservabilityPage is adminOnly - need admin test user. MySoundBoard has intermittent JS error on sendMessage.
rca_of_the_issue: MySoundBoard TypeError: The error occurs at sendMessage() line 231 when messageOverride is passed from suggested action buttons (line 663, 702). If action.prompt is not a string (e.g., undefined), the ?? operator falls through to input, but if input is also not properly initialized, .trim() fails. Mitigation: Add defensive String() cast.
